meaning: adj.有阴影的,多荫的,阴凉的
examples: Someone was waiting in the shadowy doorway.
They made out a shadowy form in front of them.
Shadowy figures approached them out of the fog.
Its fogged-out coast and shadowy, old-growth redwood forests are what happens when Jurassic Park meets Twin Peaks.
The looming GAO report promises to shine an even brighter spotlight on the shadowy industry.
